title: _base v1 — Client Onboarding Intake (minimal)
description: The minimum set of fields needed to stand up a single-agent voice receptionist. Vertical templates (plumber/hvac/dental) extend this schema with industry-specific fields. stamp.py renders {{placeholder}} markers in prompts and KB files using these values.

client_slug.description: URL-safe identifier (lowercase, hyphens), e.g. 'bama-plumbing'. Used in webhook URLs and ElevenLabs tool names.

client_name.description: Display name of the business, e.g. 'Bama Plumbing & Drain'.

agent_name.description: Name the AI agent uses on calls. Keep it short and natural.

voice_id.description: ElevenLabs voice ID. Select from voice library, preview in admin UI.

webhook_base_url.description: Public base URL of the SR voice-bot service, e.g. 'https://sr-voice-bot-925407339242.us-central1.run.app'.

tool_secret.description: Shared secret for X-Tool-Secret header. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32. Usually pulled from ELEVENLABS_TOOL_SECRET env var at provision time.

business_hours.description: Human-readable business hours, e.g. 'Monday–Friday 9:00 AM–5:00 PM, Saturday & Sunday closed'.

holiday_hours.description: Optional — holiday closures, e.g. 'Closed Thanksgiving and Christmas Day'.

main_phone.description: Main business phone in E.164 format, e.g. '+12055551234'. Used for general transfers.

escalation_phone.description: The number the agent transfers to when qualification succeeds. Usually the owner or dedicated receptionist line.

owner_name.description: Business owner's first name, used when taking messages ('I'll have John call you back').

owner_email.description: Owner's email for callback notifications via Postmark.

owner_phone.description: Owner's SMS number for callback notifications via Twilio. E.164 format.

services_summary.description: 1–3 sentence summary of what the business offers. Gets rendered into the main prompt and the services KB file.

service_area.description: Plain-English service area description, e.g. 'Birmingham, Alabama and surrounding communities'.

first_message.description: Greeting the agent says when the call connects. Example: 'Hi, thanks for calling {{client_name}}! This is {{agent_name}}. How can I help?'. Must not reference 911 unless the business is in a life-safety vertical (plumbing-emergency, medical).

integrations.description: Optional — per-client overrides for integration config.

elevenlabs_knowledge_base_id.description: Populated by stamp.py after KB upload. Do not fill manually.
